title: justicia antirrhina
intro: Justicia antirrhina, also known as the "Snake Head" or "Herbe à serpent", is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, particularly in Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Justicia antirrhina are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating menstrual cramps, among other uses. In herbal preparations, Justicia antirrhina is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being applied topically to wounds and skin irritations.
